A clear description of the bug.

What you expected instead.

**Setup**
- Seerr TV version (from the GitHub release, e.g. v1.5):
- Device + OS (e.g. ONN Pro 4K / Google TV, Fire TV Stick 4K / Fire OS):
- Server type + version (Jellyseerr / Seerr / Overseerr):

**Screenshots / photos**
A photo of the TV screen helps a lot for a 10-foot UI.

**Notes**
> This app is a client that renders your server's web UI. If the same problem
> happens in a desktop browser pointed at your server, it's likely a server-side
> (Jellyseerr/Seerr) issue rather than a Seerr TV one.
